name: Vector Eight
explanation: A vector-synthesis polysynth in the Sequential Prophet VS lineage. Four oscillators (sine, saw, square and a hollow-digital tone) sit at the corners of a vector square and are blended by an X/Y position. The signature SCAN orbits that position with an LFO so the timbre is in constant motion even on a single held chord. 8-voice poly through a resonant two-pole low-pass. Controls: Cutoff, Resonance, Vector X, Vector Y, Scan (orbit speed and depth) and Level.
